botConstructor.title: Omuzimbi wa Bot
botConstructor.subtitle: Zimba bot yo mu ngeri ey’okulaba — tewali koodi yeetaagibwa
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Kaale! Nze ndi bot yo. Kozesa /help okulaba ebiragiro.
botConstructor.randomPick: Bot alondawo emu mu ngeri ey’ekifuulannenge
botConstructor.docsCommand: Eddamu nga omukozesa asindika ekiragiro ekigere (e.g. /help, /start). Osobola okwongerako emitendera gy'emboozi okukola emboozi ez'emitendera mingi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Addamu ng'obubaka bw'omukozesa bukwatagana n'omusono. Akozesa regex — e.g. "hello|hi" ekwatagana n'ebigambo byombi. Obutafaayo ku nsonga nnene.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Obubaka obusooka abakozesa bwe balaba nga batandika bot ne /start. Buli bot yandibadde n’emu.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Aweereza obubaka mu ngeri ey’otoma ku nteekateeka. Kirungi nnyo okujjukiza buli lunaku, okugaaya buli wiiki, oba okulangirira buli luvannyuma lwa kiseera.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Amatabi ga bot logic. Kebera enkyukakyuka oba okuyingiza kw’omukozesa era oddemu mu ngeri ey’enjawulo okusinziira ku bivuddemu.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot alondawo eky’okuddamu kimu mu ngeri ey’ekifuulannenge okuva ku lukalala. Kituukira ddala ku nseko, obukodyo, okulamusa, oba okuddamu okw’enjawulo.
botConstructor.docsApi: Akola okusaba kwa HTTP eri API ey'ebweru era n'ekozesa eky'okuddamu mu bubaka bwa bot. Kozesa {data.field} okujuliza ennimiro z'okuddamu.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Aweereza notification eri room admin nga triggered. Omugaso ku kulabula, okumanyisibwa kw'abakozesa abapya, oba okutereeza.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Yongera emitendera ku Command block okukola interactive dialogs. Buli mutendera gubuuza ekibuuzo, gulinda eky’okuddamu ky’omukozesa, era ne gukitereka mu nkyukakyuka. Kozesa enkyukakyuka mu kuddamu okusembayo ne {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Kozesa curly braces {variable} mu kiwandiiko ky'okuddamu okuyingiza emiwendo egy'amaanyi. Enkyukakyuka z’embeera zisigala mu bubaka bwonna.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Enkyukakyuka ezimbiddwamu ezisangibwa mu buli kuddamu:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Osobola okukozesa ensengeka eringa eya HTML mu by'okuddamu:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Tandika ne Welcome block — kye kintu abakozesa kye basooka okulaba
botConstructor.docsTip2: Yongera ekiragiro /help ekiwandiika ebiragiro byonna ebiriwo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Kozesa emitendera gy’emboozi okwewandiisa, okunoonyereza, oba okukung’aanya ebikwata ku bantu
botConstructor.docsTip4: Gatta bulooka z’Embeera n’enkyukakyuka ez’okutandika amatabi mu ngeri ey’amagezi
botConstructor.docsTip5: Gezesa bot yo ng'oyogera nayo mu kisenge oluvannyuma lw'okugiteeka mu nkola

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Ekiwandiiko ky’Olulimi
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Olulimi lw'okuwandiika olukola obulungi olw'okuzimba bots. 96 ebifaananyi. Rust backend.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix lulimi olukwata ku domain (DSL) olukoleddwa okuva wansi okuwandiika Vortex bots. Ennimi endala we zeetaaga amaterekero g’ebitabo, okuddamu okuyita, ne boilerplate, Gravitix ekuwa abakwata emikolo egy’omutindo ogusooka, okutambula kw’emboozi, n’embeera ezimbiddwamu — byonna mu nsengeka ennyonjo, esomebwa nga eluŋŋamizibwa Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Readable — code esoma nga intent, so si byuma
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — ebika ebitali bikyuka bikwata ensobi nga tebannaba kukola
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Okwolesebwa — okukulukuta, abakuumi, n’okukwatagana kw’emisono bizimbibwamu
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — tewali bibiina, tewali busika, tewali nkola za kuyiga
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ya muntu yenna ayagala okuzimba Vortex bot mu bwangu — oba towandiikangako code, oba oli seasoned developer akooye Python boilerplate. Ekiwandiiko kino kisomesa Gravitix okuva ku misingi egisooka: tekyetaagisa bumanyirivu nga bukyali.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Buli kitundu kizimba ku ebyo ebyasooka. Bw’oba ​​mupya mu kukola pulogulaamu, soma okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi. Bw’oba ​​omanyi dda olulimi olulala, kozesa ebirimu okubuuka butereevu ku ekyo ekikunyumira.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Ekkubo erisinga okusimbula okuva ku ziro okutuuka ku bot edduka.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: ku /start { ... } — etegeeza omukwasi akola ng'omukozesa asindika /start. emit "..." — esindika obubaka okudda eri omukozesa. {ctx.first_name} — eyingiza erinnya ly'omukozesa erisooka mu lunyiriri.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Mu Gravitix IDE, nyweza ku bbaatuuni ya Run mu bbaala eya waggulu. Yingiza Vortex Bot Token yo nga osabiddwa. Bot etandika mangu — tewali mutendera gwa kuzimba gwetaagibwa.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Buli pulogulaamu ya Gravitix ezimbiddwa okuva mu bizimbe bisatu ebikulu: handlers, emit statements, ne logic.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Buli muwendo mu Gravitix gulina ekika. Enkola y'ekika tekyukakyuka: ebika bikeberebwa mu kiseera ky'okukung'aanya, nga bot yo tennatambula.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Abaddukanya emirimu bagatta emiwendo okufulumya emiwendo emipya.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Ennyiriri mu Gravitix biwandiiko ebiriko enkodi ya UTF-8. Ziwagira okuyingiza obugagga n’ekibinja ky’emirimu egyazimbibwamu.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Emirimu gy'emiguwa nga giyita mu bizimbibwa
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Pattern-match omuwendo ku patterns eziwera. Kilowoozeeko nga sitatimenti ya switch ey’amaanyi.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Emirimu giba bulooka za koodi eziddamu okukozesebwa. Zikuyamba okwewala okuddiŋŋana n’okukwanguyira okutegeera koodi.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Abakwate gwe mutima gwa Gravitix bot. Buli mukwasi awuliriza ekika ky'ekintu ekigere era adduka ng'ekintu ekyo kibaddewo.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Abakuumi bakuleka okwongerako akakwakkulizo ku mukwasi. Omukwasi adduka singa omukuumi yeekenneenya ku kituufu.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Ekintu kya ctx kibeerawo munda mu buli mukwasi. Kirimu ebikwata ku bubaka obuliwo kati n’omukozesa eyabuweereza.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State ereka bot yo okujjukira ebintu wakati w'obubaka. Awatali state, buli bubaka bwetongodde era bot terina memory.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Flows zikusobozesa okuwandiika emboozi ez’emitendera mingi mu ngeri ya linear, esomebwa. Flow esobola okuyimirirako katono n'erinda obubaka bw'omukozesa obuddako.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Okusindika obubaka kye kisinga okufuluma mu bot.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Dukanya code automatically ku schedule — tewali mirimu gya cron, tewali mpeereza za bweru zeetaagibwa.
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: ku — okudduka mu kiseera ekigere eky’olunaku
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Omukozi wa payipu |> ayisa omuwendo nga ensonga esooka eri omulimu oguddako. Kifuula emirimu gy’okusiba enjegere okusomebwa, okuva ku kkono okudda ku ddyo.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix egaba okukwata ensobi okutegekeddwa nga try / catch / finally blocks.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs ekusobozesa okugatta data ekwatagana wansi w'ekika ekituumiddwa erinnya. Enums zitegeeza ekibinja ekiggaddwa eky’enjawulo.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix esindika etterekero ly'okubala eririmu emirimu ~180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix erina ekika ekizibu enzaaliranwa — pair ya 64-bit floats ezikiikirira ebitundu ebituufu n’eby’okulowooza.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix erimu calculus y’omuwendo: ebivaamu n’ebisengekeddwa ebibalirirwa ku mirimu egy’okwesalirawo.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra ye kubala kwa vekita ne matriksi.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Endowooza y’ennamba esoma eby’obugagga bya namba enzijuvu. Omusingi gw’okuwandiika ebikusike eby’omulembe.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Ebibalo biwa ebikozesebwa okunnyonnyola, okwekenneenya, n’okusalawo okuva mu biwandiiko.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Emirimu egy’enjawulo bye bigonjoola ensengekera za ddiferensi ezikulu.
gravitixDocs.gammaRelated: Gamma & emirimu egyekuusa ku nsonga eno
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Enkyukakyuka ya Fourier evunda siginiini mu firikwensi zaayo ezigikola.
gravitixDocs.bp3: Kozesa abakuumi mu kifo kya if-chains okufuna olukusa
gravitixDocs.bp5: Kozesa okudda nga bukyali okukendeeza ku kuzimba ebisu
gravitixDocs.bp6: Ebintu biwe amannya mu ngeri etegeerekeka obulungi
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Engeri esinga okuyiga Gravitix kwe kuzimba. Tandika ne echo bot ennyangu, olwo osseeko state, olwo osseeko flows. Buli ndowooza empya gy’oyiga eggulawo ebintu ebirala ebisoboka.

bestpractices.cc6: ✅ Flat nga eriko returns nga bukyali
bestpractices.h3: 3. Kozesa guards mu kifo kya if-chains okufuna olukusa
bestpractices.h5: 5. Kozesa return nga bukyali okukendeeza ku kuzimba ebisu
bestpractices.h6: 6. Tuuma amannya g’ebintu mu ngeri etegeerekeka obulungi
bestpractices.p1: Enkola n’emize egifuula Gravitix bots zo okwesigika, okusomebwa, n’okulabirira.
bestpractices.p2: Buli bot erina okuba ne fallback on msg handler kale abakozesa bulijjo bafuna response:

Gravitix ekusobozesa okuddukanya okubalirira kuno munda ddala mu Vortex bot nga tolina tterekero lya bweru.

error.p1: Zingira code yonna eyinza okulemererwa mu try block. Singa ensobi eba thrown — oba nga Gravitix runtime oba mu bulambulukufu ku code yo — okutuukiriza kubuuka ku catch block. Omuwendo ogukwatiddwa gusibiddwa ku nkyukakyuka gy’otuuma erinnya lya catch.
error.p2: finally eddukira awatali bukwakkulizo — oba try yatuuka ku buwanguzi oba catch yakwata ensobi. Kikozese okufulumya eby'obugagga, okuwandiika, oba okuweereza obubaka obw'okumaliriza.
error.p3: Kozesa okukwata ensobi ku mirimu egyesigama ku kuyingiza okw'ebweru: okusengejja ebiwandiiko by'omukozesa, okuyita APIs, okusoma enkyukakyuka z'embeera, oba okukola okubala okuzibu nga ensobi za domain (sqrt of negative, log of zero) zisoboka. Ku nsobi za logic ez’omunda, singa kwagala guard clauses ne returns ezisooka.

intro.li1: Readable — code esoma nga ekigendererwa, so si byuma
intro.li2: Safe — ebika ebitali bikyuka catch ensobi nga tezinnaba kudduka
intro.li4: Minimal — tewali bibiina, tewali busika, tewali nkola za kuyiga
intro.p1: Gravitix lulimi olukwata ku domain (DSL) olukoleddwa okuva wansi okuwandiika Vortex bots. Ennimi endala we zeetaaga amaterekero g’ebitabo, okuddamu okuyita, ne boilerplate, Gravitix ekuwa abakwata emikolo egy’omutindo ogusooka, emboozi flows, n’ebizimbibwamu state — byonna mu nsengeka ennyonjo, esomebwa nga eluŋŋamizibwa Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix ya muntu yenna ayagala okuzimba Vortex bot mu bwangu — oba towandiikangako code, oba oli seasoned developer akooye Python boilerplate. Ekiwandiiko kino kiyigiriza Gravitix okuva ku misingi egisooka: tekyetaagisa bumanyirivu nga bukyali.
intro.p3: Buli kitundu kizimba ku ebyo ebyasooka. Bw’oba ​​mupya mu kukola pulogulaamu, soma okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi. Bw’oba ​​omanyi dda olulimi olulala, kozesa ebirimu okubuuka butereevu ku ekyo ekikunyumira.
intro.p4: Mu kujuliza kuno kwonna, → kitegeeza "okwekenneenya okutuuka" oba "okufulumya", ate // ... kitegeeza ebigambo ebibuusibwa amaaso omukung'aanya.

math_complex.p1: Buli namba enzibu z = a + bi esobola okulabibwa ng’ensonga (a, b) ku nnyonyi ya Argand. Ekisiki ekiwanvu (horizontal axis) kye kisenge ekituufu, ekyesimbye kye kisenge ekiteeberezebwa.
math_complex.p2: Ekimu ku bisinga obukulu mu kubala: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Kino kitegeeza nti enzirugavu ya yuniti mu nnyonyi enzibu (complex plane) esengekeddwa (parametrized) n’enkoona x.
math_complex.p3: Ekigerageranyo ekizibu, sini, koosayini, ne logaritmu bigaziyizibwa okutuuka ku nnyonyi enzibu enzijuvu. Taylor series zaabwe zikwatagana everyawa (oba ku disk for log).
math_complex.p4: Ku z ne w ebizibu, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Kino kisobozesa ebigerageranyo ebitali namba enzijuvu n’ebizibu, ebiraga ebiyungo ebyewuunyisa:

math_special.h1: Gamma & emirimu egyekuusa ku nsonga eno
math_special.p1: Omulimu gwa Gamma Γ(n) gwe kugatta okutambula obutasalako okwa factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! ku namba enzijuvu ennungi. Kigaziya factorial okutuuka ku namba entuufu n’enzibu.
math_special.p2: Omulimu gw’ensobi erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t2)dt ye integral ya Gaussian. Kikwatagana butereevu ne CDF eya bulijjo era kirabika mu nsengekera z’ebbugumu n’endowooza y’obusobozi.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ ku n=1,2,3,... (nga Re(s)>1). Eyungibwa ku kugabanya kwa prime okuyita mu kiva mu Euler. Endowooza ya Riemann (etegonjoddwa!) ekwata ku ziro za ζ mu nnyonyi enzibu.
math_special.p4: Emirimu gya Bessel Jₙ(x) ne Y3(x) bye bigonjoola ensengekera ya Bessel eya ddiferensi: x2y'' + xy' + (x2−n2)y = 0. Zirabika mu kusaasaana kw’amayengo, okutambuza ebbugumu mu ssilindala, ne makanika wa kwantumu.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) ne Bi(x) bye bigonjoola ku y'' = xy. Zilabika mu quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) ne optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Famire zino eza polinomi zisituka nga eigenfunctions za operators enkulu era zikozesebwa mu nkola za spectral, quadrature, ne quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) ne E(k) zibeera integral za elliptic ezijjuvu ez’ekika ekisooka n’ekyokubiri. Zibala ekiseera kya pendulum etali ya linnya n’enkulungo ya ellipse.
math_special.td1: Γ(x) = ∫^∞ tˣ⁻1e⁻dt. Okugerageranya kwa Lanczos. Γ(n+1)=n!
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids overflow ku x ennene.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): ekwatagana ku [−1,1]. Ekitundu eky’enkoona eky’emirimu gy’amayengo ga haidrojeni.
math_special.td6: H3(x): eky’enjuyi ezikwatagana w.r.t. e^(−x2) nga bwe kiri. Ekiwujjo kya harmonic ekya quantum.
math_special.td7: T3(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): okugerageranya kwa polinomi okusinga obulungi.
math_special.td8: L3(x): ekwatagana ku [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x) nga bwe kiri. Enkola z’amayengo ga haidrojeni (hadrogen radial wavefunctions).

math_stats.li1: r = 1: enkolagana ennungi entuufu (nga X bw’akula, Y bw’akula mu kigerageranyo) .
math_stats.p1: Nga baweereddwa olukalala lw’ennamba, emirimu gino gifunza enkola ya data ey’omu makkati n’okusaasaana:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μl)(Y−μᵧ)] egera oba enkyukakyuka bbiri zitambula wamu. Enkolagana r = cov(X,Y)/(σ1·σᵧ) efuula kino mu mbeera eya bulijjo okutuuka ku [−1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) ekwatagana ne layini esinga obulungi y = a + bx okuyita mu bifo bya data nga tukozesa least squares eza bulijjo. Azzaayo [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) ku kugabanya okwa bulijjo. Akozesa okugerageranya kwa erf.
math_stats.td15: Sampuli okuva mu N(μ,σ) nga tukozesa enkyukakyuka ya Box-Muller
math_stats.td3: Omuwendo ogwa wakati nga gusunsuddwa. Ku ne n, average y’emiwendo ebiri egy’omu makkati.
math_stats.td5: Okukyama kwa square okwa wakati okuva ku kigero: Σ(xᵢ−μ)2/n
math_stats.td6: Okukyama okwa mutindo: √enjawulo. Yuniti ze zimu ne data.
math_stats.td7: p-th ku buli kikumi (0≤p≤100). p=50 ye wakati.
math_stats.td8: Normalize okutuuka ku ziro mean unit variance: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.cc1: Okugatta siginiini: omugatte gw’amayengo ga sine 440Hz ne 880Hz
math_transforms.cc10: Funa frequency esinga mu data ewereddwa abakozesa
math_transforms.cc11: Low-pass filter: zero out ebibbo bya frequency enkulu
math_transforms.cc2: (sample rate = 8 samples for demo, okukozesa okwa nnamaddala kwandibadde 44100)
math_transforms.cc5: Kebera obunene bwa buli frequency bin
math_transforms.cc6: Convolution: ssaako box filter (moving average) ku data eteredde
math_transforms.cc8: Okudda n’okudda: fft → ifft erina okuddamu okukola original
math_transforms.li3: FFT ebala ekivaamu kye kimu ne DFT naye mu O(n log n) vs O(n2) — ku n=1024 ekyo kitegeeza emirimu 1024 vs obukadde 1
math_transforms.p1: Nga tuweereddwa omutendera gwa sampuli N x[0], x[1], ..., x[N−1], Enkyukakyuka ya Discrete Fourier efulumya ebitundu bya firikwensi N ebizibu X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 ne AAC okunyigiriza amaloboozi, JPEG okunyigiriza ebifaananyi, okutambuza 5G etaliiko waya, okukola ku bubonero bwa rada, n’okuzuula ebifaananyi MRI byonna byesigamye ku FFT algorithm. Okukitegeera kikuwa amagezi ku kitundu ekinene ennyo ekya tekinologiya ow’omulembe.
math_transforms.td1: Enkyukakyuka ya Fourier ey’amangu (Cooley-Tukey). xs: olukalala lwa floats oba ebizibu. Ezzaayo olukalala lw'ebizibu. Ekisinga obulungi ku N = amaanyi ga 2.
math_transforms.td2: Ekikyuusakyusa FFT. Reconstructs time-domain signal okuva mu spektrum.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O(n2) DFT nga bwe kiri. Ekivaamu kye kimu nga fft, kikola ku N yonna.
math_transforms.td4: Okukyukakyuka: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. Ekozesebwa mu bisengejja FIR.
math_transforms.td5: Weekenneenye polinomi y’enkyukakyuka ya Laplace ku complex s

types.cc9: State ennimiro etandika null okutuusa nga eweereddwa
types.p1: Namba enzijuvu eriko akabonero ka bit 64. Awagira emiwendo okuva ku nga −9.2 × 10¹⁸ okutuuka ku +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Empisa ezimu ziyinza obutabaawo. Ennimiro ez’okwesalirawo mu ctx (nga ctx.username) ziyinza okuba null. Bulijjo kebera nga tonnaba kukozesa:
types.p11: Okwongerako ? oluvannyuma lw’ekika kigiteekako akabonero nga optional — omuwendo guyinza okuba null. Eno y'engeri parameters z'emirimu n'ennimiro za state gye ziraga "kino kiyinza oba tekiyinza kubaawo":
types.p12: Singa omuwendo guyinza obutabaawo bulijjo, guteekeko T? era bulijjo kebera != null nga tonnagukozesa. Okuyingira mu nnimiro ya null tekikuba bot — returns null mu kasirise.
types.p2: Ennamba ya 64-bit ey’obutuufu obw’emirundi ebiri floating-point.
types.p3: 10 / 3 nga erina emiwendo gya int ebiri egaba 3 (esaliddwako). Kozesa 10.0 / 3.0 ku bivudde mu decimal.
types.p5: Omuguwa gw'ebiwandiiko ogwa Unicode. Ennyiriri miwendo egitakyuka.
types.p6: Omutendera gw’emiwendo ogutegekeddwa, gwonna gwa kika kye kimu T.
types.p7: Okutuuka ku index okuva mu bbanga (e.g., nums[99] nga olukalala lulina ebintu 5) returns null okusinga okugwa bot yo.
types.p8: Okukunganya ebibiri ebisumuluzo-omuwendo. Ebisumuluzo byonna birina okuba ekika kye kimu, emiwendo gyonna girina okuba ekika kye kimu.
types.p9: Ekika kya return emirimu egita return muwendo. Totera kuwandiika void mu bulambulukufu — kye kisookerwako nga tewali kika kya return kiragiddwa.

wizard.sslLeDesc: Satifikeeti eyesigika ey'obwereere. Yeetaaga domain ne port 80.
